title: Rustic Cabbage Salad
description: A hearty and flavorful salad featuring rustic bread, crunchy cabbage, and a hint of Mediterranean flair.
instructions: Toss the rustic bread cubes with olive oil and a pinch of salt. Spread on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, combine the toasted bread, shredded napa cabbage, and mediterranean salad.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and a pinch of salt.
Pour the dressing over the bread mixture and toss to combine.
Top with shredded red cabbage and serve immediately.
